testcase.name: test_register_for_tournament

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'chips' assert 'chips' in {'seat': 7, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:119: in test_register_for_tournament assert "chips" in data, "Response should contain 'chips'" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'chips' E assert 'chips' in {'seat': 7, 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 1, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 0, ...}}

testcase.name: test_add_ai_bots

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'bot_names' assert 'bot_names' in {'bots': [{'personality': 'balanced', 'seat': 5, 'username': 'RiverRat'}, {'personality': 'tight-aggressive', 'seat': 6, 'username': 'DeepStack'}, {'personality': 'tight-passive', 'seat': 7, 'username': 'LAGgy'}], 'bots_added': 3, 'success': True, 'total_players': 4}

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:157: in test_add_ai_bots assert "bot_names" in data, "Response should contain 'bot_names'" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'bot_names' E assert 'bot_names' in {'bots': [{'personality': 'balanced', 'seat': 5, 'username': 'RiverRat'}, {'personality': 'tight-aggressive', 'seat': 6, 'username': 'DeepStack'}, {'personality': 'tight-passive', 'seat': 7, 'username': 'LAGgy'}], 'bots_added': 3, 'success': True, 'total_players': 4}

testcase.name: test_force_start_tournament

failure.message: AssertionError: Response should contain 'status' assert 'status' in {'message': 'Tournament started!', 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 2, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 9, ...}}

testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:196: in test_force_start_tournament assert "status" in data, "Response should contain 'status'" E AssertionError: Response should contain 'status' E assert 'status' in {'message': 'Tournament started!', 'success': True, 'tournament': {'active_player_count': 2, 'ante': 0, 'big_blind': 50, 'big_blind_seat': 9, ...}}

testcase.name: test_get_tournament_state
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:216: in test_get_tournament_state assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_player_action_fold
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:254: in test_player_action_fold assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_full_game_flow
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:310: in test_full_game_flow assert create_response.status_code == 200, f"Create failed: {create_response.text}" E AssertionError: Create failed: {"detail":"Already in a tournament"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_leave_tournament
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:390: in test_leave_tournament assert create_response.status_code == 200 E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_bot_ai_makes_decisions
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:465: in test_bot_ai_makes_decisions tournament_id = create_response.json()["tournament_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'tournament_id'

testcase.name: test_game_phase_progression
testcase.failure: tests/test_poker_tournament.py:516: in test_game_phase_progression tournament_id = create_response.json()["tournament_id"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E KeyError: 'tournament_id'
